events.text: Goal! Curaçao 0, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Nicolas Pépé (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Yan Diomande.
Nicolas Pépé (Côte d'Ivoire) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Christ Inao Oulaï replaces Amad Diallo.
Substitution, Curaçao. Jeremy Antonisse replaces Livano Comenencia.
Goal! Curaçao 0, Côte d'Ivoire 2. Nicolas Pépé (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ibrahim Sangaré.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Oumar Diakité replaces Ange-Yoan Bonny.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Elye Wahi replaces Nicolas Pépé.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Bazoumana Touré replaces Yan Diomande.
Juninho Bacuna (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Curaçao. Gervane Kastaneer replaces Juriën Gaari.
Substitution, Curaçao. Tyrese Noslin replaces Deveron Fonville.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Jean Michaël Seri replaces Franck Kessie.
Gervane Kastaneer (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Curaçao. Shurandy Sambo replaces Joshua Brenet.
Substitution, Curaçao. Brandley Kuwas replaces Jürgen Locadia.
